hero.bio: Full Stack Developer specialized in .NET (C#, ASP.NET Core, Blazor) and modern frontend with React and TypeScript. Experienced in SQL Server, mobile apps with Flutter, and AI integration to streamline development.

about.title: About me
about.text: I work across the full software lifecycle — from architecture to continuous deployment with Git and CI/CD pipelines. I've led enterprise solutions that cut operational times by over 90%, integrated electronic invoicing with SUNAT, and implemented security measures against XSS, CSRF, and Path Traversal.

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: My professional journey in software development.

highlights: Data pipeline automation: CSV downloads from Google Cloud Storage and SQL Server processing with MERGE stored procedures.
Interactive reporting modules with Vue.js and .NET; security hardening against CSRF, XSS, and Path Traversal.
Migrated legacy jQuery and Bootstrap on Western Union's FX project, reducing technical debt.
CI/CD with GitLab and Azure DevOps for automated deployments and operational reporting.
Built GSCommerce from scratch: inventory, HR, and role-based access control (RBAC).
95% faster operations: Excel reports from 40 min down to under 2 min.
Electronic invoicing integrated with SUNAT via REST/SOAP: invoice issuance from 10 min to under 10 sec.
Secure architecture with mitigations against XSS, Path Traversal, and unauthorized access.
Modernized legacy .NET application: technical debt refactoring and architecture optimization.
75% faster response times: window load from 10-20 s down to 2-5 s.
Supplier Management module: digitized paper-based process, search time from 10 min to under 1 min.
Desktop attendance management app with C#, WinForms, and local database architecture.
Barcode ID cards: 70% lower operating costs and check-in from 1 min to 3 sec per person.
Member, branch, and role modules; fully offline solution with no internet dependency.
Web system modernization and improved operational efficiency.
Advanced features for enhanced user experience.
Redesign and implementation of the municipal web portal.
Built with PHP (Laravel), JavaScript, HTML5, and CSS3.
